description: Beta patch: cherry-picks v0.5.10 stable fixes (git-add-f prevention + Pi #246/#249) + version-update hint at session start (PR #254).
changelog:
**Bug Fixes:**
- fix(scripts): `add_session.py` and `task.py archive` no longer print a generic `git add .polygon && git commit` fallback when the repo's `.gitignore` excludes `.polygon/`. They now stage only specific Polygon-owned paths and auto-retry with `git add -f -- <specific-paths>` only on `ignored by` stderr. The warning text explicitly states `Do NOT use \`git add -f .polygon/\``, naming `.polygon/.backup-*`, `.polygon/worktrees/`, `.polygon/.template-hashes.json`, `.polygon/.runtime/`, `.polygon/.cache/` as the subpaths users should ignore individually instead. Helper centralized in `templates/polygon/scripts/common/safe_commit.py`.
- fix(pi): Pi extension now injects `<workflow-state>` breadcrumb on every `input` and `before_agent_start` event, plus a `<session-overview>` block sourced from `.polygon/scripts/get_context.py`. The `subagent` tool registration carries a `promptSnippet` with the `Active task: <path>` dispatch protocol. Closes #249.
- fix(pi): Project-level `packages["npm:pi-subagents"]` override added to `.pi/settings.json` so a globally-installed `npm:pi-subagents` cannot inject `extensions / skills / prompts / themes` into the current Polygon project. `scrubPiSettings` reverses the override on `polygon uninstall`. Closes #246.

**Enhancements:**
- feat(scripts): `get_context.py` default mode now performs a once-per-session `polygon --version` check and prepends `Polygon update available: <current> -> <latest>, run npm install -g @mindfoldhq/trellis@latest` before the context body when the local install lags. Best-effort with a 1-second timeout; failures silently skip. Marker stored under `.polygon/.runtime/` (auto-ignored). Closes #254.
notes: Beta patch on top of 0.6.0-beta.4. Run `polygon update`. Brings the four 0.5.10-line fixes / features into the 0.6 beta line.
